multi_step: solver must apply a constraint ('two neighbouring squares are never allowed to have the same number') to a missing-piece placement task

there are 5 answer choices, implying comparison across alternatives
question is image-grounded, so reasoning likely combines visual parsing with constraint checking
verifiability: answer is a discrete option '(D)', making final-answer checking straightforward
choices A-E are provided, so correctness can be verified against a fixed candidate set
image_manifest shows a present PNG asset with nontrivial resolution (1683x640), supporting downstream review

decision_reasons: Core assets are complete: question text, answer, and primary image are all present, with no registry issues.
